name: Telegram Group Allowlist Guard
description: Allows group read/context ingestion, supports an optional read-only group mode, and blocks unsafe group-triggered replies/tool execution.

enabledAccounts.label: Enabled Accounts
enabledAccounts.help: Restrict guard to selected telegram account ids. Empty means all accounts.

maxSenderAgeMs.label: Sender Cache TTL
maxSenderAgeMs.help: Maximum age in milliseconds for last inbound sender context.

awarenessSenderAgeMs.label: Awareness TTL
awarenessSenderAgeMs.help: Maximum age in milliseconds for group awareness snippets in DM context.

awarenessMaxGroups.label: Awareness Group Limit
awarenessMaxGroups.help: Maximum number of recent groups included in DM awareness context.

stateAgentsDir.label: State Agents Directory
stateAgentsDir.help: Path to agent session indexes used to hydrate known groups.

blockAllGroupReplies.label: Block All Group Replies
blockAllGroupReplies.help: When true, enabled accounts can read groups but never send group replies or run group-triggered tools.
